lines: The World Cup is in full swing here in the U.S. and the next match will be a U.S. game.
The Indiana Fever fell to the Atlanta Dream 113‑96 yesterday and will host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow.
The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 today, keeping their 31‑44 record.
Caitlin Clark is averaging about 21 a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers.
escape_hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.

* The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 today, keeping their 31‑44 record.  
* Caitlin Clark is averaging about 21 a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers.  

Escape hatch: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
speech: Here's the sports talk for Indianapolis, Sunday, June 21. The World Cup is in full swing here in the U.S. and the next match will be a U.S. game. The Indiana Fever fell to the Atlanta Dream 113‑96 yesterday and will host the Phoenix Mercury at 8 p.m. tomorrow. The Indianapolis Indians beat the Iowa Cubs 3‑1 today, keeping their 31‑44 record. Caitlin Clark is averaging about 21 a game for the Fever, one of the league’s top scorers. And if it gets away from you, your out is: I mostly just catch the highlights, honestly.
